name: Pyramid
description: Stepped pyramids built of stacked tiers, climbing up or down on each seed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 180deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 20% 66%, 35% 66%, 35% 33%, 50% 33%, 50% 0, 50% 33%, 65% 33%, 65% 66%, 80% 66%, 100% 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 20% 66%, 35% 66%, 35% 33%, 50% 33%, 50% 0, 65% 33%, 65% 66%, 80% 66%, 100% 100%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
